pages.text:
THE MINISTER FOR

FOREIGN AFFAIRS

Copenhagen, 30 March 2016

Excellency,

I have the honour to inform you that the Government of the Kingdom of Denmark approves the Protocol of accession by the Kingdom of the

Netherlands to the Convention of 16 December 1988 concerning the construction and operation of a European Synchrotron Radiation

Facility as adopted by the Parties to the Protocol on 9 December 1991 in Paris.

Until further notice the Protocol shall not apply to Greenland and the Faroe Islands.

Please accept, Excellency, the assurances of my highest consideration.

Kishin

Kristian Jensen

H.E. Jean-Marc Ayrault

Minister of Foreign Affairs

Ministry of Foreign Affairs

PARIS
